name: search_flights
description: Search for flights between airports with flexible natural language queries. Costs $0.01 USDC per search via x402 micropayments.

arguments.name: from
arguments.desc: Departure airport (IATA code or city name)

arguments.name: to
arguments.desc: Arrival airport (IATA code or city name)

arguments.name: returnDate
arguments.desc: Return date for round trips (optional, YYYY-MM-DD format)

name: get_flight_details
description: Get detailed information about a specific flight from search results

name: check_balance
description: Check x402 payment wallet balance and system health status

name: get_booking_status
description: Check the status of a flight booking using booking reference
